channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Black bags, drawers dumped, 8th July
item.description:
Rubbish dumped corner of southover and sudbury crescent. Please put a sign up. Or camera. Something to stop this :(

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southover, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic Cone dumped i, 8th July
item.description:
A traffic cone has been thrown over the park railing into the shrubbery border ( or what is left of it) adjoining Croydon Rd. Lots of windblown rubbish has collected here as well.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood, 8th July
item.description:
Wood

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hargwyne Street, Stockwell, Greater London

item.title: Bin overflowing, 8th July
item.description:
Bin by park entrance overflowing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter collecting for a while, 8th July
item.description:
Would be good if this area gets checked on a regular basis as it attracts a lot of litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Common, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree growth obstructing pavement, 8th July
item.description:
Tree growth obstructing pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Massive tree branch fell, 8th July
item.description:
Tree branch fallen on path and on a car. Footpath no longer usable
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Highshore Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped broken fan in the street, 8th July
item.description:
Southwark council tenant at 18 Wingfield Street dumped their broken fan in the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Wingfield Mews, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garbage in the street not cleared up, 8th July
item.description:
There is rotting garbage in the street not cleared up. For some reason residents of this block do not have bins and dump their bags in the street consistently

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 177-179, Southwark Bridge Road, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Priory park Road, outside the grange school, 8th July
item.description:
Lots of old clothes left outside the school

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Abandoned small fridge, 8th July
item.description:
Been left here for weeks. Fly tipped fridge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Handforth Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working outside Redding House on Thames Path, 8th July
item.description:
One of the street lights outside Redding House, on the Thames Path by the river, is not working. The neighbouring street lights are illuminated, but this one remains off after dark. I first noticed the issue a couple of days ago and it has still not been repaired. Please could it be inspected and fixed? Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harlinger Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No entry signs in wrong place ?, 8th July
item.description:
Due to the burst water main on Bromley common there are no entry signs in crown lane spur and Salisbury Road. There are no diversions in Oban and residents of Victoria Road, Albert Road, Mosslea Road and Balfour Road (probably other roads too) cannot access their homes and no diversion signs are in place. Cars are either ignoring the signs or stopping in the road and turning. There are no diversion signs or warnings of the 2 no entry signs early on. It’s inconvenient but also there is going to be an accident. Please sort asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albert Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed glass and rubbish, 8th July
item.description:
Glass all over the street, bin bags, nappies and rotting food all over the place as usual. Has been there for several days and is a health and safety concern.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two mattresses dumped beneath QMHosp roundabout, 8th July
item.description:
Two mattressess have been dumped at side of carriageway behind crash barrier, on Kent-bound side of A20, beneath the QM's Hosp roundabout...obvs someone stopped in the road at great risk just to dump them!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidcup By-pass, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping again, 8th July
item.description:
More Flytipping - please can we explore camera here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
